Description: Nested family type sync — map nested family types theo parent type. Pattern da stable (95/95 proven).

Use_When: family co nested family instance can type mapping per parent type
task yeu cau nested child family doi type theo parent type
pattern: parent type A -> nested child type X, parent type B -> nested child type Y
Dont_Use_When: nested family chi co 1 type — khong can sync
task chi can load nested family — dung family.load_nested_safe don le
family khong co nested family instances
DecisionGate.Prefer_Over: Manual ChangeTypeId() approach — FamilyManager.Set per-type la cach dung duy nhat de persist.

Steps.Purpose: Xem danh sach types cua parent family va nested families.
Tim nested family instances trong family doc. Lay nested instance id.
Steps.Verify: NestedInstances list co it nhat 1 entry.

Steps.Purpose: Tao family control parameter (type parameter, FamilyType) de lien ket nested type.
Steps.Condition: Chi can neu chua co control parameter.

Steps.Purpose: Associate nested type parameter voi control parameter. Set value per parent type.

Params.hint: Per parent type: fm.CurrentType = parentTypeA; fm.Set(controlParam, nestedTypeX.Id)

Steps.Verify: family.xray shows control parameter set per type.

Steps.Purpose: Verify moi parent type co nested type mapping dung.
Steps.Verify: TypeParameters shows controlParam values differ per type.

QcStep.ExpectedOutcome: Moi parent type co nested type value rieng. ControlParam visible per type.
